ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capitals" (
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the capital belongs to */,
  "capital_name" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the capital city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the capital city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the capital city */,
  "major_attractions" TEXT /* Major tourist attractions in the capital city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capitals_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distances" (
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance record */,
  "capital1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first capital city */,
  "capital2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second capital city */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Distance between the two capitals in kilometers */,
  "distance_miles" REAL /* Distance between the two capitals in miles */,
  "flight_distance_km" REAL /* Specific distance for flights in kilometers */,
  "train_distance_km" REAL /* Specific distance for trains in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distances_capital2_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital2_id") REFERENCES capitals ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distances_capital1_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital1_id") REFERENCES capitals ("capital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_times" (
  "travel_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel time record */,
  "capital1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first capital city */,
  "capital2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second capital city */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation (e.g., flight, train, bus) */,
  "travel_time_hours" REAL /* Travel time between the two capitals in hours */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price for the travel mode */,
  "frequency_per_day" INTEGER /* Number of available trips per day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_times_capital1_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital1_id") REFERENCES capitals ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_times_mode FOREIGN KEY ("mode") REFERENCES modes_of_transportation ("mode_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_times_capital2_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital2_id") REFERENCES capitals ("capital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modes_of_transportation" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode of transportation */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode of transportation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mode of transportation */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the mode */,
  "carbon_footprint" REAL /* Estimated carbon footprint of the mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the booking */,
  "capital1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first capital city */,
  "capital2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second capital city */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mode of transportation */,
  "travel_date" TEXT /* Date of travel */,
  "price" REAL /* Total price of the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES modes_of_transportation ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_capital1_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital1_id") REFERENCES capitals ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_capital2_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital2_id") REFERENCES capitals ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "itineraries" (
  "itinerary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each itinerary */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking the itinerary belongs to */,
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the capital city */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival at the capital city */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure from the capital city */,
  "activities" TEXT /* Planned activities in the capital city */,
  "accommodation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accommodation for the itinerary stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("itinerary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_itineraries_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_itineraries_capital_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital_id") REFERENCES capitals ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_itineraries_accommodation_id FOREIGN KEY ("accommodation_id") REFERENCES accommodations ("accommodation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accommodations" (
  "accommodation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accommodation */,
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the capital city the accommodation is located in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the accommodation */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the accommodation */,
  "price_per_night" REAL /* Price per night at the accommodation */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the accommodation */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities provided by the accommodation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accommodation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accommodations_capital_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital_id") REFERENCES capitals ("capital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "accommodation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accommodation being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_accommodation_id FOREIGN KEY ("accommodation_id") REFERENCES accommodations ("accommodation_id")
)
